message:
refactor: Improve core modules and test infrastructure

- Enhanced benchmark sizing and watcher loop
- Improved IPC communication handling
- Enhanced pattern matching capabilities
- Updated tailer module
- Improved TUI: app, query, views modules
- Updated test corpus and bug reproduction tests
- Enhanced main entry point

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -621,7 +621,10 @@ fn builtin_codex_pack() -> PatternPack {
                 agent_type: AgentType::Codex,
                 event_type: "usage.reached".to_string(),
                 severity: Severity::Critical,
-                anchors: vec!["You've hit your usage limit".to_string()],
+                anchors: vec![
+                    "You've hit your usage limit".to_string(),
+                    "You've reached your usage limit".to_string(),
+                ],
                 regex: Some(r"try again at (?P<reset_time>[^.]+)".to_string()),
                 description: "Codex usage limit reached".to_string(),
                 remediation: Some("Wait for reset or switch account".to_string()),
@@ -670,7 +673,10 @@ fn builtin_codex_pack() -> PatternPack {
                 agent_type: AgentType::Codex,
                 event_type: "auth.device_code".to_string(),
                 severity: Severity::Info,
-                anchors: vec!["Enter this one-time code".to_string()],
+                anchors: vec![
+                    "Enter this one-time code".to_string(),
+                    "enter this one-time code".to_string(),
+                ],
                 regex: Some(r"(?P<code>[A-Z0-9]{4}-[A-Z0-9]{5})".to_string()),
                 description: "Codex device authentication code prompt".to_string(),
                 remediation: Some("User needs to enter the code in browser".to_string()),

@@ -1,4 +1,15 @@
 [
+  {
+    "rule_id": "codex.session.resume_hint",
+    "agent_type": "codex",
+    "event_type": "session.resume_hint",
+    "severity": "info",
+    "confidence": 0.95,
+    "extracted": {
+      "session_id": "abc12345-def6-7890-abcd-0123456789ab"
+    },
+    "matched_text": "codex resume abc12345-def6-7890-abcd-0123456789ab"
+  },
   {
     "rule_id": "codex.session.token_usage",
     "agent_type": "codex",
@@ -13,16 +24,5 @@
       "reasoning": "150"
     },
     "matched_text": "total=15,000 input=8,500 (+ 2,000 cached) output=4,500 (reasoning 150)"
-  },
-  {
-    "rule_id": "codex.session.resume_hint",
-    "agent_type": "codex",
-    "event_type": "session.resume_hint",
-    "severity": "info",
-    "confidence": 0.95,
-    "extracted": {
-      "session_id": "abc12345-def6-7890-ghij-klmnopqrstuv"
-    },
-    "matched_text": "codex resume abc12345-def6-7890-ghij-klmnopqrstuv"
   }
 ]

@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 Session complete.

-To resume later, run: codex resume abc12345-def6-7890-ghij-klmnopqrstuv
+To resume later, run: codex resume abc12345-def6-7890-abcd-0123456789ab
